description: agent-trust-bench — reproducible complementarity cases proving SkillSpector (content) and CallLint (authority) answer different questions. Self-authored / opt-in fixtures only; no third-party project is named. SkillSpector reports are committed fixtures, never a live run. Offline; the scanned config is never executed.

cases.theme: clean code that reads the whole home directory
clean code requesting an admin OAuth scope
safe content with an auto-payment capability
an incomplete content scan is never a pass
